name: CF: Door-to-Door Citizen Engagement
objective: Verify citizen priorities and household needs in Kitwe.
mainMessage: Citizen First: Putting Zambians first. We are checking in to ensure your voice is heard at the national level.
talkingPoints: Resources: Our plan to ensure local mines benefit the local community.
Employment: Priorities for local hiring in government projects.
Unity: Building a united Zambia for all citizens.

questions.prompt: Do you feel local resources benefit your community?

name: CF: Grassroots Village Tour
objective: Mobilize community groups and cooperatives in Nkana area.
mainMessage: Grassroots Power: Strengthening our communities from the ground up.
talkingPoints: Agriculture: Support for local small-scale farming cooperatives.
Infrastructure: Upgrading village access roads and bridges.

name: CF: Kitwe Mega-Broadcast
objective: Mass awareness of upcoming grassroots summits and unity rallies.
mainMessage: Citizen First: Join the Movement! Public forum tomorrow at the Kitwe Central grounds. Unity is our strength!

name: CF: National Unity Rally
objective: Promote national unity and economic sovereignty for all citizens.
mainMessage: Citizen First: Putting Zambians First. A united vision for a prosperous future.
talkingPoints: Economic Sovereignty: Control over our own destiny and resources.
National Unity: One Zambia, One People, Putting Citizens First.
